title: The Earth and Its Riches

verses.text: The earth and its riches abundantly stored, The world and its dwellers belong to the Lord. For he on the seas its foundations has laid, And firm on the waters its pillars has stayed.
O who shall the mount of the Lord God ascend? And who in the place of his holiness stand? The man of pure heart and of hands without stain, Who swears not to idols, nor serves what is vain.
O gates, lift your heads! Ancient doors, lift them high! The great King of glory to enter draws nigh! This great King of glory, O who can he be? The Lord God of hosts, King of glory is he!
O gates, lift your heads! Ancient doors, lift them high! The great King of glory to enter draws nigh! O who is the King that in glory draws near? The LORD, mighty LORD of the battle is here!
O gates, lift your heads! Ancient doors, lift them high! The great King of glory to enter draws nigh! This great King of glory, O who can he be? The Lord God of hosts, King of glory is he!
